name: k_12_education_policy_near_miss_event_stonehaven_rig_utl
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In K-12 Education Policy, the situation tagged internally around education policy near miss event stonehaven rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mateo Park
agents.identity: I am Mateo Park, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in K-12 Education Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Nowak
agents.identity: I am Hector Nowak, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in K-12 Education Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mateo Park must choose under rights versus utility. What does Mateo Park do?
